column.name: good_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM goods WHERE name = 'Говядина шейная часть')

column.name: tag_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM tags WHERE name = 'масса набор')

column.name: good_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM goods WHERE name = 'Говяжья голяшка (нарезка)')

column.name: tag_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM tags WHERE name = 'масса набор')

column.name: good_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM goods WHERE name = 'Творог обезжиренный')
